title: Flea Treatment in Metuchen, NJ | $350 – $650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Metuchen, NJ. Effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Prices from $350 – $650. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Metuchen home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Metuchen, NJ, using proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages. Our experienced technicians serve residential and commercial properties across this historic Middlesex County borough with fast, effective solutions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of pest control expertise to Metuchen residents and businesses, offering same-day service and guaranteed results. Our licensed technicians use safe, EPA-approved treatments that are effective against fleas while being pet-friendly and family-safe.
localContext: Metuchen's charming Victorian homes, tree-lined neighborhoods near Main Street, and properties around the historic Metuchen Train Station can all be vulnerable to flea infestations, especially in homes with pets. Our team is familiar with the unique pest control needs of Metuchen's older residential areas and newer developments alike, providing customized treatment plans for every property type.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Metuchen, NJ?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Metuchen typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, complete elimination may take 2-3 weeks as the treatment works through all flea life stages (eggs, larvae, pupae, and adults). A follow-up treatment is often recommended after 14 days to ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry completely. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions based on the products used in your home.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Metuchen home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation improves treatment effectiveness. We recommend vacuuming all carpets and furniture thoroughly, washing pet bedding in hot water, removing pet toys and food bowls, and ensuring pets are treated by a veterinarian. Our team will provide a complete preparation checklist when scheduling your appointment.
